subject: rpmsg: qcom_glink_native: fix error return code of qcom_glink_rx_data()
notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. POC/features/verifier reused from C3 err-3-rep3 (deterministic per seed; POC-side scaffolding not ablated per L0 spec). Only isErrReturnFunction kept as the single predicate; the P2 (failure-branch goto) and P3 (err-still-zero-at-goto) logic from the C3 3-predicate plan is inlined verbatim in the final assembly where-clause. final.ql compiles on first try; fires on qcom_glink_rx_data_buggy (poc.c lines 52, 59, 64), silent on qcom_glink_rx_data_fixed (recorded, not used as accept criterion per L0 spec).
